title: First $100 Product Bundle Marketplace Listing Packet

fields.value: Fifteen ready-to-transfer business-template and digital-product ZIPs in one private delivery bundle.
A one-sale $100 product transfer bundle with 15 ready local paid ZIPs, public manifest, private delivery checklist, and clear proof boundary.
Solo operators, indie makers, consultants, and small teams that want reusable templates, digital assets, and lightweight operations tools without commissioning a custom build.

HTML5 micro game kit, procedural SFX pack, SVG icon pack, printable planner pack, synthetic mock dataset pack, browser extension template, CSV CLI toolkit, CSS component pack, SVG wallpaper pattern pack, Anki flashcard deck, mini course workbook, JSON schema fixture pack, invoice/expense tracker, prompt workflow pack, and sales enablement kit.
Deliver first-100-product-bundle.zip privately only after external payment proof exists. Do not publish the paid ZIP on public pages.

Single buyer transfer for internal/business use. Buyer may adapt outputs for their own projects. No resale, redistribution, sublicensing, credential handling, regulated advice, or unsupported income/outcome guarantees.

Because this is a digital transfer, use the seller platform's refund policy and do not promise refunds beyond what the seller can honor. Count money only after payment is posted, released, payable, or cleared.
Deliver after payment proof exists; target same-day private transfer when seller account, buyer email, and delivery channel are ready.

Includes transfer of the prepared ZIP and manifest. Does not include custom implementation, ongoing support, extra revisions, private-account login work, paid ads, scraping behind logins, or handling secrets/payment data.
digital bundle, business templates, CSV tools, operations templates, micro assets, small business, solo operator, productized service, first 100

Listing packet, cover image, public manifest, issue activity, page views, and downloads count $0. Count only a real buyer payment after accepted terms, private delivery, and posted/released/payable/cleared funds.

full_description:
# First $100 Product Bundle

A one-sale $100 private product transfer bundle with 15 ready local paid ZIPs and a public manifest.

## What the buyer gets

- 15 prepared ZIP components with a combined listed value of $278.
- Business templates, CSV tooling, micro assets, printable/workbook assets, and operations packs.
- Public manifest and SHA-256 seal so the buyer can verify exactly what was prepared before transfer.
- Private ZIP delivery after accepted terms and external payment proof.

## Best fit

Solo operators, consultants, indie makers, and small teams that want useful starter assets without commissioning custom work.

## Not included

Custom implementation, ongoing support, extra revisions, account login work, paid ads, scraping behind logins, regulated advice, credential handling, or unsupported income/outcome guarantees.

## Proof and payment boundary

This listing copy is not payment proof. The seller should deliver first-100-product-bundle.zip only after a real buyer accepts the product-transfer terms and pays through a seller-controlled checkout, invoice, marketplace order, funded milestone, or payment request. Count money only after payment is posted, released, payable, or cleared.
money_rule: Listing packet, cover image, public manifest, issue activity, page views, and downloads count $0. Count only a real buyer payment after accepted terms, private delivery, and posted/released/payable/cleared funds.
